import structlog
from contextvars import ContextVar

logger = structlog.get_logger()
trace_id_ctx = ContextVar("trace_id")

def process_event(event_data):
    # Correct: explicitly bind or pass trace_ids to structured loggers for distributed tracing
    logger.info(
        "event_processed",
        type=event_data["type"],
        status="success",
        trace_id=trace_id_ctx.get("unknown")
    )
